title: Risk program Analyst
description: As an Analyst within the Ecosystem Risk Insights and Controls team, you will drive the launch and operationalization of a regional risk program, building the framework, process, and monitoring capabilities to identify and remediate elevated risk merchants. You will engage with a diverse range of stakeholder groups in our AP markets and the Singapore Market Support Centre to educate, advise and align, ensuring smooth operations of the programs. Key Responsibilities • Monitor, investigate and report on the Visa Merchant Elevated Risk Program performance through intelligent and efficient use of data analytics and dashboards • Manage the notifications and billing of program fees and non-compliant assessments when applicable • Communicate with clients and internal stakeholders on program identifications and updates • Support automation efforts and tool design to leverage technology for efficiency and greater quality What you will need:   We are looking for an early career individual with a curiosity about payments, detail oriented, results-driven, and client focused. • 3-5 years of relevant work experience in an operations, preferably within the banking or payment industry. • Work with a sense of urgency and deliver under tight deadlines • Possesses a proactive approach and will do what it takes to move a project forward (ownership)  • Quantitative aptitude with attention to detail and process orientation needed to manage revenue and billing operations • Energetic verbal and written communication skills, able to speak the language of the recipient • Comfortable working independently within a complex and often ambiguous environment.  • Strong planning, organising and stakeholder management skills • A keen eye for process and program improvement where relevant • Deep proficiency iin Excel, PowerBI, PowerPoint, or PowerAutomate is a strong advantage

postedCompany.description:
SOFTENGER (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

Softenger offers a variety of managed services in the field of Information Technology. We are committed to provide the right services to maintain and enhance your IT infrastructure, so that you can focus on achieving your business vision. Ideas are the foundation of evolution. There must be a drive to act on those ideas. Our services start with precision, thinking, followed by focused approach and proficient execution. Softenger provides your business with a board array of enterprises system management services based in Industry-Standard methodologies and practices. From system, database administration to security and continuity of business, we deliver services that will meet your business strategies and goals.
